---

title: "Stream an Immich asset rendition"
description: "`variantExt` is `thumbnail.jpg`, `preview.jpg`, `original.jpg`, or"
sidebar_label: "Stream an Immich asset rendition"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"

custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Stream an Immich asset rendition"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/immich/assets/{linkId}/{assetId}/{variantExt}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



`variantExt` is `thumbnail.jpg`, `preview.jpg`, `original.jpg`, or
`original.mp4` (thumbnails/previews are always JPEG; only `original`
can be a video). Auth like `/uploads/*`: header or `?token=`.
`Range` requests are forwarded, so video seeking works.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
  
</ParamsDetails>
